news.title:
Mutual funds overweight on pharma, healthcare as growth visibility improves; sector accounts for 7.3% of portfolios in Feb 2026.
Pharma stocks like Sun Pharma, Dr. Reddy's, Biocon outperform Nifty 50; long-term returns strong despite risks like regulation and competition.
news.summary:
Mutual funds overweight on pharma, healthcare as growth visibility improves; sector accounts for 7.3% of portfolios in Feb 2026.
Pharma stocks like Sun Pharma, Dr. Reddy's, Biocon outperform Nifty 50; long-term returns strong despite risks like regulation and competition.

news.title:
Sensex recovers 450 points, Nifty aims rebound after oil drop, US rally.
Stocks to watch: Reliance, Sun Pharma, Tata Motors CV, RVNL.
news.summary:

news.title:
Tata Motors to raise commercial vehicle prices by 1.5% from April 1, 2026; Sun Pharma's sBLA for ILUMYA accepted by US FDA.
RVNL wins ₹95.3 crore contract in Chhattisgarh; GMDC signs MoU with NMDC for rare earth collaboration in Gujarat.
news.summary:
Tata Motors to raise commercial vehicle prices by 1.5% from April 1, 2026; Sun Pharma's sBLA for ILUMYA accepted by US FDA.
RVNL wins ₹95.3 crore contract in Chhattisgarh; GMDC signs MoU with NMDC for rare earth collaboration in Gujarat.

news.title: Sun Pharma's Ilumya® gets US FDA approval for treating active psoriatic arthritis.
news.summary: Sun Pharma's Ilumya® gets US FDA approval for treating active psoriatic arthritis.

news.title:
Sun Pharma derives 67% revenue from exports, leading among peers.
Cipla's revenue mix is balanced; domestic market contributes 49%.
news.summary:
Sun Pharma derives 67% revenue from exports, leading among peers.
Cipla's revenue mix is balanced; domestic market contributes 49%.

news.title:
Goldman Sachs rates Sun Pharma 'Sell' with a target price of Rs 1550.
This reflects a bearish outlook for Sun Pharma shares.
news.summary:
Goldman Sachs rates Sun Pharma 'Sell' with a target price of Rs 1550.

news.title:
Emkay Global revises portfolio, adding Infosys, HCL Tech, Indus Towers, SRF; exits Mphasis, Sun Pharma, Gravita.
It turns marginally overweight on IT sector, citing attractive valuations post AI sell-off; sees 6.5-18.3% return potential.
news.summary:
Emkay Global revises portfolio, adding Infosys, HCL Tech, Indus Towers, SRF; exits Mphasis, Sun Pharma, Gravita.
It turns marginally overweight on IT sector, citing attractive valuations post AI sell-off; sees 6.5-18.3% return potential.

news.title:
Sun Pharma's FY25 revenue reached Rs 520 Bn, with India contributing 33% and US formulations 31%. EBITDA margin improved to 29%.
The company operates in over 100 countries, leads the Indian pharma market with 8.4% share, and invests 6.2% of sales in R&D.
news.summary:
Sun Pharma's FY25 revenue reached Rs 520 Bn, with India contributing 33% and US formulations 31%. EBITDA margin improved to 29%.
The company operates in over 100 countries, leads the Indian pharma market with 8.4% share, and invests 6.2% of sales in R&D.

news.title:
Global PE firms like General Atlantic and KKR are exploring a $150-200M investment in Synthimed Labs, valuing it at $1B ahead of its IPO.
Synthimed, backed by IndiaRF, specializes in APIs with 86% export revenue. Intense competition includes Sun Pharma, Cipla, and Dr. Reddy's.
news.summary:
Global PE firms like General Atlantic and KKR are exploring a $150-200M investment in Synthimed Labs, valuing it at $1B ahead of its IPO.
Synthimed, backed by IndiaRF, specializes in APIs with 86% export revenue. Intense competition includes Sun Pharma, Cipla, and Dr. Reddy's.

news.title:
Sun Pharma's Dilip Shanghvi and Glenmark's Glenn Saldanha discuss long-term strategies behind building pharma giants.
They highlighted growth from targeting neglected therapies to leveraging India's epidemiological shift.
news.summary:
Sun Pharma's Dilip Shanghvi and Glenmark's Glenn Saldanha discuss long-term strategies behind building pharma giants.

news.title:
Sun Pharma explores AI to reduce time and costs in drug R&D.
Indian firms shift focus from generics, boosting global revenue with new drug discoveries.

The transaction was priced at Rs. 1708.2 per share.

news.title:
Sun Pharma CFO welcomed the Budget's ₹10,000 crore biologics outlay, highlighting benefits for R&D, infrastructure, and global competitiveness.
Sun Pharma plans focus on innovative medicines, US market, and semaglutide launch in India; shares fell over 6% in the past year.
news.summary:
Sun Pharma CFO welcomed the Budget's ₹10,000 crore biologics outlay, highlighting benefits for R&D, infrastructure, and global competitiveness.
Sun Pharma plans focus on innovative medicines, US market, and semaglutide launch in India; shares fell over 6% in the past year.

news.title:
Post-Budget 2026, stocks like Angel One, NMDC, Sun Pharma, and Vedanta are highlighted for capex and policy reforms.
Key sectors impacted include biopharma, infrastructure, and mining, benefiting firms like Biocon, L&T, and Titagarh Rail Systems.
news.summary:
Post-Budget 2026, stocks like Angel One, NMDC, Sun Pharma, and Vedanta are highlighted for capex and policy reforms.

news.title:

Despite short-term negative returns, Sun Pharma shows strong long-term growth.

news.title:
Sun Pharma shares rose 0.95%, closing at ₹1,610.2 after Q3 FY25 earnings.
The company reported a 16% increase in consolidated net profit for Q3 FY25.
